allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add domain foundation with pure TypeScript entities

Implement Phase 1: Domain Foundation with comprehensive test coverage.

Domain Entities:
- Moment: Named intentions (1-3 words) with allocation logic
- Area: Life domains with 5 defaults (Wellness, Craft, Social, Joyful, Introspective)
- Phase: Time-of-day configuration with wrap-around support
- Cycle: Time containers for organizing moments

Features:
- Full validation for all business rules
- Max 3 moments per (day, phase) constraint
- PostgreSQL-ready schema (UUIDs, ISO timestamps, FK structure)
- Immutable patterns with functional updates
- Type-safe with strict TypeScript

Testing:
- 120 tests passing across 4 test suites
- Vitest configuration with ESM support
- Test scripts: test, test:ui, test:coverage

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
